name: uizze
description: Ground interface work in 800,000+ real web and iOS screens and reject generic UI before shipping.

interface.longDescription: Use real web and iOS interface evidence to define a product-specific design contract, implement required states and responsive behavior, and run a hard finish gate before shipping.
defaultPrompt: Define a product-specific design contract for this interface, then implement it.
Review this UI for generic patterns and fix every blocking issue.
Plan this responsive interface from real product evidence and include every state.
